# UX UI Governance Skill

## Purpose

Apply UX/UI quality gates and design-intent controls grounded in project guidelines.

## When To Use

- ux-ui reviews
- design system alignment checks
- accessibility and consistency checks before delivery

## Workflow

1. Recover UX/UI context and constraints from approved sources.
2. Evaluate consistency, usability, accessibility, and design intent.
3. Produce prioritized findings with actionable fixes.
4. Register validated learnings for future routing.

## Guardrails

- Do not redesign outside requested scope.
- Preserve existing product constraints and brand language.
- Prefer minimal changes with measurable UX impact.
